<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Wildflower Meadow](images/03-wildflower-meadow.jpg)

For the friend who'd rather be in a meadow than a manicured garden. Cosmos, scabiosa, daisies and feathery grasses, gathered loose and casual — no symmetry, no formality, just summer in a vase.

## What's in it

- Cosmos in white and pink
- Scabiosa
- Ammi majus (Queen Anne's lace)
- Native grasses and quaking oats

## Care

Wildflowers prefer cool water and don't like aerosols nearby — keep away from kitchens with cooking fumes.
